overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open prairie grasslands with mountains in the distance. The character passes a dead animal and gestures toward a distant wooden structure under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with dirt trail

events.description: dead animal becomes visible on the left side of the trail
character raises right arm and points forward toward the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open prairie, passing a dead animal on the left

notable_agents.action: dead deer or horse lying on the grass beside the trail

entered.detail: worn dirt path cutting through the prairie grass
large rocky mountains visible in the distance under blue sky
rocky hillside formation on the right side of the landscape
small bushes and shrubs dotting the prairie
carcass of a deer lying in the grass beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through wide-open prairie grasslands under a clear blue sky. Rocky mountains rise in the distance while a rock outcrop dominates the right horizon. Around 12 seconds, a dead animal becomes visible on the left side of the path, and shortly after, the character gestures toward the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with distant rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through the grassland

entered.detail: small wooden structure or cabin visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the prairie trail as the path curves slightly. The dead animal falls behind as the character moves forward, while a distant wooden cabin becomes visible on the horizon ahead. The rock outcrop on the right moves closer as the journey continues.

events.description: character raises right arm and points forward toward the wooden cabin

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant wooden structure while gesturing at it

entered.detail: wooden fence posts running parallel to the trail on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the wooden cabin visible in the distance, with the structure growing larger in the frame. Fence posts appear on the left side of the trail. Around 52 seconds, the character points toward the building ahead, continuing the steady walk through the sunlit prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail through wide-open prairie grasslands that gradually leads toward a distant wooden cabin. It begins with the character walking under a clear blue sky, passing a rock outcrop on the right and a dead animal on the left before the character gestures toward the horizon. As the path curves slightly, the dead animal falls behind and the distant cabin becomes more prominent against the backdrop of rocky mountains. The scene then expands as the character approaches the structure, with fence posts appearing along the left side of the trail. Finally, the wooden cabin grows larger in the frame as the character points toward the building while continuing a steady walk through the sunlit landscape.
